name: Archery legends
description: Welcome to Archery Shooter Range, the ultimate web game for archery enthusiasts. Experience two thrilling modes: Classic Mode, set in an archery range stadium with challenging obstacles, and Adventure Mode, where youll test your skills against dynamic animal targets in a jungle setting. Enjoy realistic physics, stunning graphics, and competitive leaderboards. Whether youre practicing or competing, Archery Shooter Range offers endless fun and challenge. Join now and become a master archer!
instructions: Aim Tap and hold to aim at your target Adjust your aim to ensure accuracy Shoot Release to shoot your arrow Control Keep the direction of the wind in mind to control the direction of your arrow Adjust your aim accordingly to compensate for any wind
tags: 1 Player, Adventure, arrows, Casual, Puzzle, Shooting, Strategy
